description: Triggers when user wants to create, plan, or optimize content for social media platforms
should_trigger: Write a LinkedIn post about my product launch
Create a Twitter/X thread about SaaS growth tips
Build a social media content calendar for my startup
What are good hooks for viral LinkedIn content?
How do I grow my audience on Instagram for my brand?
Repurpose my blog post into social content
Create engaging social posts about my new feature
should_not_trigger: Write copy for my landing page
